stemHtml: What relationship exists between the wind at 3000 feet and the surface wind?

options.a: They have the same direction, but the surface wind is weaker, caused by friction
options.b: The wind at 3000 ft is parallel to the isobars and the surface wind direction is across the isobars toward the low pressure and the surface wind is weaker.
options.c: The surface wind is veered compared to the wind at 3000 feet and is usually weaker.
options.d: They are practically the same, except when eddies exist, caused by obstacles
